violations.text: (Various food product) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation.PIC informed New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

Glue traps observed with dead cockroaches.PIC to remove traps. PIC made service call to PCS technician during inspection. Confirmed appt for 10/23/24 to treat cockroaches. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of (dry ingredienst ). Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

The ice machine and prep sink is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
